seoTitle: East Devonport vs East Launceston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Devonport and East Launceston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Devonport vs East Launceston: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Devonport and East Launceston.
heading: East Devonport vs East Launceston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Devonport, Tasmania and East Launceston, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Launceston has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to East Devonport (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Devonport or East Launceston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Devonport has a flood risk score of 39/100, while East Launceston scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Devonport scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. East Launceston scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Devonport or East Launceston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Launceston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
